<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Translation\Dumper; use Symfony\Component\Translation\MessageCatalogue; /** * IniFileDumper generates an ini formatted string representation of a message catalogue. * * @author Stealth35 */ class IniFileDumper extends FileDumper { public function formatCatalogue(MessageCatalogue $messages, string $domain, array $options = []): string { $output = ''; foreach ($messages->all($domain) as $source => $target) { $escapeTarget = str_replace('"', '\"', $target); $output .= $source.'="'.$escapeTarget."\"\n"; } return $output; } protected function getExtension(): string { return 'ini'; } }
